pageDescription: Clean broken entries and harden your system
notAvailableDescription: Registry cleaning is only available on Windows
advancedFeatureDescription: A registry backup (.reg) will be created before any modifications.
emptyStateDescription: Check for broken registry entries and system hardening opportunities.
cardRegistryCleanupDescription: Broken app paths, orphaned uninstall entries, invalid file associations, and stale references
cardSecurityDescription: UAC, Defender, firewall, RDP, SMBv1, and other critical security settings
cardNetworkDescription: LLMNR and WPAD auto-proxy — common attack vectors
cardServicesDescription: Print Spooler and Fax service audit
cardScheduledTasksDescription: Orphaned tasks, telemetry collectors, and third-party update tasks
confirmFixDescription: This will modify {{count}} registry entries. A backup will be created first.
toastScanFailedDescription: Make sure the app has sufficient permissions
toastScanFailedError: Failed to scan registry. Make sure the app is running with sufficient permissions.
